Home page/About/Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

Describe the types of information, purposes of use and user choices that may be involved in the inquiry, subscription, communication and service processes. It is recommended to have legal review before official launch.

Information collectionPurpose of useSecurity protectionUser rights
Information collectionUsageSecurity protectionUser selection

Information we may collect

When you submit a quote, upload a model, subscribe to information, or contact us, we may collect necessary information such as your name, contact information, company information, project requirements, documents, and communication records.

How information is used

Relevant information is mainly used for needs assessment, quotation communication, manufacturing services, customer support, content subscription and service improvement. Client project files should not be used for public display unrelated to the Services without the necessary authorization.

Information Security

We will adopt reasonable access controls, document management and internal procedures to protect information security. When it comes to confidential projects, it is recommended that both parties further clarify through confidentiality agreements, scope of authority and document delivery methods.

Your Choices and Contact

You can make subscription unsubscriptions, information corrections, project file deletions or privacy-related inquiries through the contact information on the page. The specific handling method should be confirmed based on account status, contract requirements and legal obligations.
